positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map, featuring stylized constellations and abstract cosmic dust patterns. The central element is a bold, stylized depiction of the Moon and stars using clean lines and solid color shapes. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a seamless, repeating apparel pattern. Style should be a blend of Mid-century modern graphic design and celestial cartography. Color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, gold leaf accents, and creamy white. Use high contrast for punchy silhouettes and crisp edges. The overall aesthetic should evoke wonder, mystery, and timeless elegance. Vector illustration style, perfect for direct-to-garment printing.
